title: Mega Showdown: Extra Megas Companion Pack
description: Custom movesets to make pokemon with mega evolutions in MSD Extra Megas more useful
body:
This datapack is designed to work with [Mega Showdown Extra Megas](https://modrinth.com/project/msd-extra-megas!) to give moves to pokemon like Luxray who get a new type/ability from their mega that they can't exactly make the most use of.

It's kept seperate from the Extra Megas mod to prevent incompatibilities/allow people to choose whether they want a custom moveset that I made or a moveset from a different mod that does something similar.
